Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration With Aaa And Stay Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Raymond Kim And Bradley M. Tanner
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Chelsea Hollins, Esq. (949.661.1007; chelseahollins@nealefhima.com) of Neale & Fhima APC for Plaintiff (audio only).
Brad Tanner, Esq. (415.916.6994; brtanner@tesla.com) of Tesla, Inc. for Defendant.

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration With AAA And Stay Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Arbitration is granted.

[see word minutes for details.]

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
